## Safety And Data Check

- [ ] This PR does not commit private chart packs, private basemaps, generated caches, credentials, or machine-local paths.
- [ ] Safety-facing behavior is tested or manually verified if this touches position, heading, depth, AIS, alarms, route progress, chart rendering, weather, tide, current, or routing.
- [ ] Public wording still describes Helm as supplemental alpha software, not primary or certified navigation.
